creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
All of these patches apply to:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=139095&cat=

My first patch submitted, wasn't processed correctly, so I had to make a 
separate PR for a new article.

This patch is only needed if Apache doesn't support a .log extension. I 
found this out after testing locally and then moving it to a webserver, 
after already submitting the patch.
